name: Pilotfish (SS-386)
events: 29 Mar 1944 USS Pilotfish (Lt.Cdr. R.H. Close) departed from New London bound for Pearl Harbor.
16 May 1944 USS Pilotfish (Lt.Cdr. R.H. Close) departed from Pearl Harbor for her 1st war patrol. She was ordered to patrol west of the Mariana Islands.
4 Jul 1944 USS Pilotfish (Lt.Cdr. R.H. Close) ended her 1st war patrol at Majuro.
27 Jul 1944 USS Pilotfish (Lt.Cdr. R.H. Close) departed from Majuro for her 2nd war patrol. She was ordered to patrol of the Bonin Islands.
1 Sep 1944 USS Pilotfish (Lt.Cdr. R.H. Close) possibly sank the Japanese auxiliary vessel Ina Maru (853 GRT) north-northwest of Chichi Jima in position 30°32'N, 140°55'E.
14 Sep 1944 USS Pilotfish (Lt.Cdr. R.H. Close) ended her 2nd war patrol at Pearl Harbor.
14 Oct 1944 USS Pilotfish (Lt.Cdr. A.G. Schnable) departed from Pearl Harbor for her 3rd war patrol. Once again she was ordered to patrol off the Bonin Islands.
10 Dec 1944 USS Pilotfish (Lt.Cdr. A.G. Schnable) ended her 3rd war patrol at Midway.
20 Jan 1945 USS Pilotfish (Lt.Cdr. A.G. Schnable) departed from Midway for her 4th war patrol. She was ordered to patrol in the East China Sea.
25 Mar 1945 USS Pilotfish (Lt.Cdr. A.G. Schnable) ended her 4th war patrol at Pearl Harbor.
21 May 1945 USS Pilotfish (Lt.Cdr. A.G. Schnable) departed from Pearl Harbor for her 5th war patrol. She was ordered to patrol off Marcus Island.
20 Jun 1945 USS Pilotfish (Lt.Cdr. A.G. Schnable) departed from Saipan after a short stay to resume her 5th war patrol, this time off the east coast of Japan.
14 Jul 1945 USS Pilotfish (Lt.Cdr. A.G. Schnable) ended her 5th war patrol at Guam.
9 Aug 1945 USS Pilotfish (Cdr. A.G. Schnable) departed from Guam for her 6th war patrol. She was ordered to patrol to the south-east of Japan.
31 Aug 1945 USS Pilotfish (Cdr. A.G. Schnable) enters Tokyo Bay.
3 Sep 1945 USS Pilotfish (Cdr. A.G. Schnable) departed from Tokyo Bay bound for Pearl Harbor.
